title: IPO-anchored VWAP
question: Does buying the IPO-anchored VWAP touch beat the market?
finding: No, and the deeper test makes it worse. The raw win-rate is a coin flip (~49%, CIs straddle 50%), but that is cohort beta: market-adjusted, fewer than 44% of touches beat SPY (90-day median excess -3.5% pullback / -4.5% reclaim, cluster CI below zero), and the lone positive number (reclaim +6.8% mean excess) is 2-3 microcap moonshots. A useful descriptive level, a negative-edge entry.
